summary: Mobile-first UI testing for The Doggy Company Pet Life OS. All critical mobile navigation features working correctly: single Navbar at top, bottom nav bar with Mira orb, hamburger menu opens from left as white panel overlay via portal (z-index 99999/100000), covers bottom nav, closes on overlay click. Learn page modals work correctly with ProductDetailModal (z-index 50000) above LearnContentModal (z-index 11000). All 13 Life Pillars visible in both hamburger menu and /pet-home pillar shortcuts grid. No duplicate headers or tab bars on /pet-home.

details: Single Navbar at top with hamburger menu, logo, user icon, cart
Bottom nav bar with HOME, INBOX, Mira orb FAB (center), ORDERS, MY PET
No duplicate headers or tab bars on /pet-home
Hamburger button count: 1, Bottom nav count: 1
Opens from left as white panel overlay via createPortal to document.body
Overlay z-index: 99999, Panel z-index: 100000
Bottom nav z-index: 9995 - menu fully covers bottom nav
Click overlay to close works correctly
Shows 'Hi, Dipali' greeting, MY DOGS section with Mojo (100% soul)
13 LIFE PILLARS section with all pillars visible
Pet selector visible (Mojo 100%, Mystique 94%)
Pet hero card with soul score (Mojo, Indie, 100% Soul)
Soul chapter pills: Identity, Behaviour, Health, Social, Nutrition, Learning
See Picks CTA button visible
Proactive alerts: 'Schedule a wellness check'
Open Requests section visible
Pillar shortcuts grid with all 13 pillars
Category pills visible: Foundations, Behaviour, Training, Tricks & Fun
Clicking Foundations opens LearnContentModal at z-index 11000
Modal shows personalized content for Mojo (Indie breed)
Products displayed inside modal (Advanced Training Program - ₹499)
Clicking 'View Details' opens ProductDetailModal at z-index 50000
ProductDetailModal correctly appears ABOVE LearnContentModal

bottom_nav_on_pillar_pages.details: Bottom nav bar visible on all pillar pages inside MainLayout

details: Full Name input visible
Email Address input visible
Phone Number input visible
Password input visible
Create Account button visible
Login here link visible

login_flow.details: Login with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 redirects to /pet-home correctly

critical_code_review_comments: MobileMenu.jsx correctly uses createPortal to document.body with z-index 99999/100000 for proper overlay
ProductDetailModal z-index 50000 correctly above LearnContentModal z-index 11000
MobileNavBar.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
All 13 Life Pillars correctly defined in both MobileMenu.jsx and PetHomePage.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile navigation features working correctly. Hamburger menu opens from left via portal with z-index 99999/100000, covers bottom nav (z-index 9995), closes on overlay click. Learn page modals work with ProductDetailModal (z-index 50000) above LearnContentModal (z-index 11000). All 13 Life Pillars visible in hamburger menu and /pet-home pillar shortcuts. No duplicate headers or tab bars. Register page functional. Login redirects to /pet-home correctly.
